error_signature: Connect a trigger to run this node
title: Missing trigger node for OCR Space integration
symptom: When attempting to run the OCR Space node, n8n displays the message 'Connect a trigger to run this node'.
applies_when: No trigger node present in the workflow
not_this_if: Trigger node is present in the workflow
root_cause: n8n requires a trigger node to initiate the execution of any workflow. Without a trigger, nodes cannot run, leading to the error message indicating the absence of a trigger.
fix_steps: Add a Manual Trigger node to the workflow
Connect the Manual Trigger node to the OCR Space node
Save the workflow and try executing it again
agent_instruction: Add a Manual Trigger node to your workflow to enable execution.
